title: E-Commerce Dashboard
description: A responsive dashboard for managing online store products, orders, and customer analytics. Built with modern web technologies featuring real-time data visualization.

title: Weather Forecast App
description: A weather application that provides real-time forecasts, hourly data, and 7-day predictions with beautiful UI animations and location-based services.

title: Task Management System
description: A collaborative task management tool with drag-and-drop functionality, team assignments, deadline tracking, and progress reporting features.

title: Recipe Finder
description: A recipe search application that helps users discover new meals based on available ingredients, dietary preferences, and cuisine types.

title: Chat Application
description: A real-time messaging application with user authentication, group chats, emoji support, and message history features.

title: Portfolio Website Generator
description: A tool that generates customizable portfolio websites from user input, with multiple themes, sections, and export functionality.
